$schema_note: Project-level Claude Code settings for the CIT content-generation workflow. Loaded for every teammate who opens this repo. REQUIRES Python 3.8+ reachable on PATH as `python` — every hook/statusline/script below is launched that way. There is no python3/py fallback; if `python` is missing the hooks fail silently (open), so the HITL gate-router stops enforcing without warning. If your machine only ships python3, alias or symlink it to `python`. See CLAUDE.md 'Runtime prerequisite'.

SessionStart.comment: Auto-activates caveman if installed; one-line note + non-blocking if not.

UserPromptSubmit.comment: Gate-checks CIT slash commands against topic.progress.json. Hard-block on fail.
